# Contributing to ryopc Global Digital Support 🚀

First off, thank you for considering contributing to **ryopc Global Digital Support**! It's people like you who help us ensure everyone, everywhere, has access to legitimate and fair technical support.

By participating in this project, you agree to abide by our mission to protect users from fraudulent practices and bridge the global digital divide.

---

## 🗺️ How You Can Contribute

We welcome contributions from everyone, whether you are a developer, designer, writer, or tech support enthusiast.

### 1. Reporting Bugs & Requesting Features

- Before opening a new issue, please search the existing issues to see if it has already been reported.
- Use our **Issue Templates** to provide clear descriptions, steps to reproduce, or clear problem statements.

### 2. Contributing Code & Joining as a Member

- Look for issues labeled `good first issue` or `help wanted` if you are looking for a place to start.
- Fork the repository, create a new branch for your feature or fix, and submit a **Pull Request (PR)**.
- Please fill out the PR template completely so our maintainers can review your changes efficiently.

### 3. How to Register as a Member (`member.json`)

If you want to join our team or become an official contributor, please add your information to the `member.json` file in your PR.

**Format Example:**

```json
{
  "members": [
    {
      "id": "admin-1",
      "nickname": "game-ryo",
      "email": "ryotagtagtag@gmail.com"
    },
    {
      "id": "M001",
      "nickname": "YOUR_NICKNAME",
      "email": "YOUR_EMAIL@example.com"
    }
  ]
}
```

- Ensure your JSON file remains valid and formatted correctly before submitting.
- Don't forget to check the **Future Contribution** checkbox in your Pull Request template!

---

## 🛠️ Development & Rules

### Code of Conduct

We expect all contributors to maintain a professional, respectful, and collaborative environment. Be kind to fellow developers and users.

### Security First

As part of our commitment to secure development (certified by OpenSSF Baseline), do not report security vulnerabilities via public issues. Please report any security concerns privately according to our security guidelines.

### License

By contributing to this project, you agree that your contributions will be licensed under the **Apache-2.0 License**.

---

## 💬 Get in Touch

- **Live Support / Community:** Powered by **Channel Talk** (Check our main page for the live chat link)
- **Direct Inquiries:** For core membership or organizational questions, please contact **ryopcCEO**.

_“Ensuring global digital equity, one device at a time.” — ryopcCEO_
